markets.no_sub_title: Miguel Rojas: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 2+ total bases in the Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 3+ hits in the Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 2+ hits in the Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 1+ hits in the Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Miguel Rojas: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 2+ home runs in Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Miguel Rojas records 1+ home runs in Arizona vs Los Angeles D professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 8:30 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Miguel Rojas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Miguel Rojas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Miguel Rojas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
